title: Sector Rotation Relative Strength Filter
summary: Each morning, pull 1-month and 3-month price returns for the 9 SPDR sector ETFs (XLK, XLF, XLE, XLV, XLI, XLY, XLP, XLRE, XLU) using yfinance. Rank them by composite momentum (weighted average of 1M and 3M returns). Only allow long entries for stocks whose sector ranks in the top 3; only allow short entries for stocks in the bottom 3 sectors. Stocks in the middle 3 sectors are treated as neutral — signal must exceed a higher threshold to enter. This exploits the well-documented sector momentum anomaly (persistence of sector-level relative strength over 1–6 months) using entirely free data.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — Portfolio Construction, Trade Selectivity & Alternative Data
expected_impact: +4–7% win rate by trading with sector tailwinds
deferral_reason: Future; not core to stock selection now — deferred during paper_trading_single_account prioritisation
